notes: v387 — 🗑 Delete a holding on your phone. The 'Delete holding' action used to sit only in the ⋯ menu, which doesn't appear on the mobile card layout — so on a phone there was no way to reach it. Now there's a 🗑 Delete button right on each holding card. It clears a wrong or corrupted position without recording a sale and returns the cash you paid for it; it asks you to confirm first, and your 🤖 auto-pilot account is never touched. Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
